productDisplayName: Nike Men Cruiser Retro Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack round neck T-shirt for men made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, and has short sleeves, graphic print on the front with branding in silver print on left chest and left sleeveFitComfortWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned for that absolute running experience, this nike T-shirt is replete with Dri-Fit comfort to make your sporting experience all the more comfortable and fun. The Dri-Fit technology wicks away sweat, allowing you to concentrate on your running, while the mesh side panels enhance ventilation and regulate body temperature. Team this with performance shorts and running shoes for complete running comfort.
